# Expectations: [Area Name]

> **Codeowners:** @handle1 @handle2
> **Paths:** `path/to/area/**`
> **Status:** Draft — please review and correct

This file describes the review expectations for changes in this area. It is used by PR authors
as pre-flight guidance and by automated reviewers (BrAIn, `/bug-check`) as concrete criteria.

---

## Hard Blockers

Changes that **must** be addressed before merge:

- [ ] **[Rule name]**: Describe the requirement precisely. Include why it matters.
  - Example: _"Any change to a public header must bump the corresponding CHANGELOG entry."_

---

## Guidance

Informational expectations — strong preferences but not hard blockers:

- **[Topic]**: Guidance goes here. Keep it actionable.
- **[Topic]**: Another piece of guidance.

---

## Common Feedback

Things that come up repeatedly in reviews of this area:

- _Describe a recurring pattern or mistake._
- _Describe another one._

---

## Testing Requirements

- [ ] Describe what tests are expected for changes in this area.
- [ ] Note any hardware-specific tests required.

---

## Notes for External Contributors

Anything a first-time contributor to this area especially needs to know.
